1→package db
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→
     7→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     8→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5"
     9→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/rivermigrate"
    10→)
    11→
    12→const schema = `
    13→-- Tracked software projects (the central entity)
    14→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    15→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    16→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    17→    description TEXT,
    18→    agent_prompt TEXT,
    19→    agent_rules JSONB,
    20→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    21→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    22→);
    23→
    24→-- Configured ingestion sources (polling-based: GitHub, Docker Hub)
    25→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sources (
    26→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    27→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28→    provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    29→    repository VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30→    poll_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 86400,
    31→    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    32→    config JSONB,
    33→    last_polled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    34→    last_error TEXT,
    35→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    36→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    37→    UNIQUE(provider, repository)
    38→);
    39→
    40→-- Context sources (read-only references for agent research)
    41→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS context_sources (
    42→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    43→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    45→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    46→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    47→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    48→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    49→);
    50→
    51→-- Source-level releases (detected from polling sources)
    52→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS releases (
    53→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    54→    source_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    55→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    56→    raw_data JSONB,
    57→    released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    58→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    59→    UNIQUE(source_id, version)
    60→);
    61→
    62→-- Project-level semantic releases (AI-generated, correlating source releases)
    63→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_releases (
    64→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    65→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    66→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    67→    report JSONB,
    68→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    69→    error TEXT,
    70→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    71→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    72→    UNIQUE(project_id, version)
    73→);
    74→
    75→-- Join table: which source releases compose a semantic release
    76→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_release_sources (
    77→    semantic_release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    78→    release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    79→    PRIMARY KEY (semantic_release_id, release_id)
    80→);
    81→
    82→-- Notification channels (standalone)
    83→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_channels (
    84→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    85→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    86→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    87→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    88→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    89→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    90→);
    91→
    92→-- Subscriptions: two types (source releases and semantic releases)
    93→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (
    94→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    95→    channel_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES notification_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release')),
    97→    source_id UUID REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98→    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    99→    version_filter TEXT,
   100→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   101→    CHECK (
   102→        (type = 'source_release'   AND source_id  IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   103→        (type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id  IS NULL)
   104→    )
   105→);
   106→
   107→-- Agent runs (scoped to project)
   108→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_runs (
   109→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   110→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   111→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   112→    trigger VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   113→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   114→    prompt_used TEXT,
   115→    error TEXT,
   116→    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   117→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   118→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
   119→);
   120→
   121→ALTER TABLE agent_runs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version VARCHAR(100);
   122→
   123→-- API authentication keys
   124→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
   125→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   126→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   127→    key_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   128→    key_prefix VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL,
   129→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   130→    last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   131→);
   132→
   133→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on new releases
   134→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_release_created() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   135→BEGIN
   136→    PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   137→    RETURN NEW;
   138→END;
   139→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   140→
   141→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS release_created_trigger ON releases;
   142→CREATE TRIGGER release_created_trigger
   143→    AFTER INSERT ON releases
   144→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_release_created();
   145→
   146→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on semantic release completion
   147→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   148→BEGIN
   149→    IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND (OLD IS NULL OR OLD.status != 'completed') THEN
   150→        PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'semantic_release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   151→    END IF;
   152→    RETURN NEW;
   153→END;
   154→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   155→
   156→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS semantic_release_trigger ON semantic_releases;
   157→CREATE TRIGGER semantic_release_trigger
   158→    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON semantic_releases
   159→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release();
   160→
   161→-- Release TODOs (acknowledge/resolve tracking)
   162→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS release_todos (
   163→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   164→    release_id UUID REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   165→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   166→    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   167→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   168→    acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   169→    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   170→    CHECK (
   171→        (release_id IS NOT NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NULL) OR
   172→        (release_id IS NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL)
   173→    )
   174→);
   175→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_release_id ON release_todos(release_id) WHERE release_id IS NOT NULL;
   176→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_semantic_release_id ON release_todos(semantic_release_id) WHERE semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL;
   177→
   178→-- Onboarding scans (GitHub repo dependency detection)
   179→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboard_scans (
   180→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   181→    repo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
   182→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   183→    results JSONB,
   184→    error TEXT,
   185→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   186→    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   187→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   188→);
   189→`
   190→
   191→// RunMigrations applies River's schema and the application schema. Idempotent — safe to call on every startup.
   192→func RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
   193→	migrator, err := rivermigrate.New(riverpgxv5.New(pool), nil)
   194→	if err != nil {
   195→		return fmt.Errorf("create river migrator: %w", err)
   196→	}
   197→	if _, err := migrator.Migrate(ctx, rivermigrate.DirectionUp, nil); err != nil {
   198→		return fmt.Errorf("river migrations: %w", err)
   199→	}
   200→
   201→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, schema); err != nil {
   202→		return fmt.Errorf("app migrations: %w", err)
   203→	}
   204→
   205→	// Migrate existing subscription type values: source→source_release, project→semantic_release.
   206→	// Drop old CHECK constraints first (both the named type check and the unnamed
   207→	// composite check referencing old values), then UPDATE data, then re-add constraints.
   208→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   209→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_type_check;
   210→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_check;
   211→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'source_release' WHERE type = 'source';
   212→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'semantic_release' WHERE type = 'project';
   213→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_type_check CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release'));
   214→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_check CHECK (
   215→			(type = 'source_release'   AND source_id IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   216→			(type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL)
   217→		);
   218→	`); err != nil {
   219→		return fmt.Errorf("subscription type migration: %w", err)
   220→	}
   221→
   222→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   223→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_include TEXT;
   224→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_exclude TEXT;
   225→	`); err != nil {
   226→		return fmt.Errorf("source version filter migration: %w", err)
   227→	}
   228→
   229→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   230→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS exclude_prereleases BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
   231→	`); err != nil {
   232→		return fmt.Errorf("source exclude_prereleases migration: %w", err)
   233→	}
   234→	return nil
   235→}

1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"log/slog"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/signal"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12→	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/onboard"
    17→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    19→)
    20→
    21→func main() {
    22→	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    23→	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    24→	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    25→	case "debug":
    26→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    27→	case "warn":
    28→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    29→	case "error":
    30→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    31→	}
    32→	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    33→
    34→	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    35→	defer stop()
    36→
    37→	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    38→	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    39→	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    40→
    41→	// Database
    42→	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    43→	if err != nil {
    44→		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    45→		os.Exit(1)
    46→	}
    47→	defer pool.Close()
    48→
    49→	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    50→		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    51→		os.Exit(1)
    52→	}
    53→
    54→	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    55→	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    56→	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    57→	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    58→
    59→	// Register River workers
    60→	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    61→	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    62→	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    63→
    64→	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    65→	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    66→	// is restarted.
    67→	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    68→	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    69→	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    70→		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    71→	}
    72→	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    73→		Provider:      llmProvider,
    74→		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    75→		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    76→		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    77→		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    78→	}
    79→	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    80→	if err != nil {
    81→		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available — agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    82→	} else {
    83→		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    84→		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    85→		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    86→	}
    87→
    88→	// Scan worker: requires LLM for dependency extraction
    89→	scanScanner := onboard.NewScanner(http.DefaultClient, "", "")
    90→	var scanExtractor *onboard.DependencyExtractor
    91→	extractorCfg := onboard.ExtractorConfig{
    92→		Provider:      llmConfig.Provider,
    93→		Model:         llmConfig.Model,
    94→		GoogleAPIKey:  llmConfig.GoogleAPIKey,
    95→		OpenAIAPIKey:  llmConfig.OpenAIAPIKey,
    96→		OpenAIBaseURL: llmConfig.OpenAIBaseURL,
    97→	}
    98→	ext, err := onboard.NewDependencyExtractor(ctx, extractorCfg)
    99→	if err != nil {
   100→		slog.Warn("dependency extractor not available", "err", err)
   101→	} else {
   102→		scanExtractor = ext
   103→	}
   104→	scanWorker := onboard.NewScanWorker(pgStore, scanScanner, scanExtractor, pool)
   105→	river.AddWorker(workers, scanWorker)
   106→	slog.Info("scan worker registered")
   107→
   108→	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
   109→	if err != nil {
   110→		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
   111→		os.Exit(1)
   112→	}
   113→
   114→	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
   115→	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
   116→	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
   117→
   118→	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
   119→		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
   120→		os.Exit(1)
   121→	}
   122→
   123→	// Ingestion layer
   124→	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   125→	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   126→
   127→	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   128→	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   129→
   130→	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   131→
   132→	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   133→
   134→	// Serve frontend static export if available
   135→	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   136→		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   137→		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   138→	}
   139→
   140→	// Register all API v1 routes
   141→	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   142→		DB:                    pool,
   143→		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   144→		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   145→		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   146→		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   147→		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   148→		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   149→		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   150→		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   151→		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   152→		OnboardStore:          pgStore,
   153→		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   154→		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   155→		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   156→		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   157→		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   158→		IngestionService:      svc,
   159→		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   160→	})
   161→
   162→	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   163→
   164→	// Start polling in background
   165→	go orch.Run(ctx)
   166→
   167→	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY → SSE bridge
   168→	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   169→
   170→	// Start HTTP server
   171→	go func() {
   172→		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   173→		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   174→			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   175→		}
   176→	}()
   177→
   178→	<-ctx.Done()
   179→	slog.Info("shutting down")
   180→
   181→	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   182→	defer cancel()
   183→	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   184→	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   185→}
   186→
   187→func envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   188→	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   189→		return v
   190→	}
   191→	return fallback
   192→}
   193→

     2→import type {
     3→  ApiResponse,

     6→  Release,
     7→  Source,
     8→  SourceInput,

    23→  Todo,
    24→  OnboardScan,

    27→} from "./types";
    28→
    29→const BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "/api/v1";
    30→
    31→async function request<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
    32→  const res = await fetch(`${BASE}${path}`, {
    33→    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...init?.headers },
    34→    ...init,
    35→  });
    36→  if (!res.ok) {
    37→    const body = await res.json().catch(() => null);
    38→    throw new Error(body?.error?.message ?? `Request failed: ${res.status}`);
    39→  }
    40→  if (res.status === 204) return null as T;
    41→  return res.json();
    42→}

## Summary Report: Complete File Analysis

I've successfully read all 11 files you requested. Below is the structured analysis with line numbers, key functions/types, imports, and interfaces.

---

### 1. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/auth.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-66

**Key Components**:
- **Interface**: `KeyStore` (lines 12-15)
  - `ValidateKey(ctx context.Context, rawKey string) (bool, error)`
  - `TouchKeyUsage(ctx context.Context, rawKey string)`

- **Function**: `Auth(store KeyStore) Middleware` (lines 17-35) — Bearer token validation middleware
- **Function**: `RateLimit(rps float64, burst int) Middleware` (lines 37-65) — Rate limiting by RemoteAddr or Bearer token key

**Imports**: `context`, `net/http`, `strings`, `sync`, `golang.org/x/time/rate`

---

### 2. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/auth_test.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-170

**Key Test Functions**:
- `TestAuthMiddlewareValidKey` (lines 16-30)
- `TestAuthMiddlewareMissingKey` (lines 32-62)
- `TestAuthMiddlewareInvalidKey` (lines 64-94)
- `TestRateLimitMiddleware` (lines 96-136)
- `TestRateLimitKeysByBearer` (lines 138-169)

**Mock Type**: `mockKeyStore` (lines 11-14)

**Imports**: `context`, `encoding/json`, `net/http`, `net/http/httptest`, `testing`

---

### 3. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/middleware.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-80

**Type**: `Middleware` (line 11) — `func(http.Handler) http.Handler`

**Key Functions**:
- `Chain(mws ...Middleware) Middleware` (lines 13-20) — Chains middlewares in reverse order
- `RequestID(next http.Handler) http.Handler` (lines 22-28) — Adds UUID request ID header
- `Logger(next http.Handler) http.Handler` (lines 30-43) — Logs request metadata
- `Recovery(next http.Handler) http.Handler` (lines 55-65) — Panic recovery middleware
- `CORS(next http.Handler) http.Handler` (lines 67-79) — CORS headers middleware

**Helper Type**: `statusWriter` (lines 45-53) — Wraps `http.ResponseWriter` to capture status code

**Imports**: `log/slog`, `net/http`, `time`, `github.com/google/uuid`

---

### 4. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/server.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-145

**Type**: `Dependencies` (lines 12-31) — DI container with:
- `DB *pgxpool.Pool`
- Multiple store interfaces: `ProjectsStore`, `ReleasesStore`, `SubscriptionsStore`, `SourcesStore`, `ChannelsStore`, `ContextSourcesStore`, `SemanticReleasesStore`, `AgentStore`, `TodosStore`, `OnboardStore`, `KeyStore`, `HealthChecker`
- `Broadcaster *Broadcaster`, `NoAuth bool`, `IngestionService *ingestion.Service`, `HTTPClient *http.Client`

**Function**: `RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies)` (lines 34-144)
- Registers 40+ API endpoints across multiple resource types (projects, sources, releases, semantic-releases, subscriptions, channels, todos, onboard, etc.)
- Implements conditional auth: public chain vs. authenticated chain based on `deps.NoAuth`

**Imports**: `net/http`, `github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool`, `github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion`, `github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing`

---

### 5. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/db/migrations.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-236

**Key Elements**:
- **Constant `schema`** (lines 12-189): PostgreSQL schema with:
  - Tables: `projects`, `sources`, `context_sources`, `releases`, `semantic_releases`, `semantic_release_sources`, `notification_channels`, `subscriptions`, `agent_runs`, `api_keys`, `release_todos`, `onboard_scans`
  - Triggers: `notify_release_created()`, `notify_semantic_release()`
  - Constraints and indexes

- **Function**: `RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error` (lines 192-235)
  - Runs River migrations
  - Executes app schema
  - Handles type migrations for subscriptions (source→source_release, project→semantic_release)
  - Adds version filters and prerelease columns

**Imports**: `context`, `fmt`, `github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool`, `github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5`, `github.com/riverqueue/river/rivermigrate`

---

### 6. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/cmd/server/main.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-193

**Key Functions**:
- `main()` (lines 21-185):
  - Configures logging from `LOG_LEVEL` env
  - Initializes database pool and runs migrations
  - Sets up River workers (NotifyWorker, AgentWorker, ScanWorker)
  - Initializes ingestion orchestrator and broadcaster
  - Registers API routes with dependencies
  - Starts HTTP server, polling, and LISTEN/NOTIFY bridge
  - Implements graceful shutdown

- `envOr(key, fallback string) string` (lines 187-192) — Helper for env vars with defaults

**Key Dependencies Initialized**:
- Database pool, River client, Ingestion service
- Agent orchestrator (with LLM config: Gemini or OpenAI)
- Scan worker with dependency extractor
- Broadcasting system for SSE

**Imports**: `context`, `log/slog`, `net/http`, `os`, `os/signal`, `time`, multiple `github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/*` packages

---

### 7. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/lib/api/client.ts`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-282

**Module Exports** (API client objects):
- `projects` (lines 46-63): list, get, create, update, delete
- `sources` (lines 67-88): listByProject, create, get, update, delete, poll
- `releases` (lines 90-103): list, listBySource, listByProject, get
- `contextSources` (lines 107-124): list, create, get, update, delete
- `semanticReleases` (lines 128-139): listAll, list, get, delete, getSources
- `agent` (lines 143-153): triggerRun, listRuns, getRun
- `subscriptions` (lines 157-183): list, get, create, batchCreate, update, delete, batchDelete
- `channels` (lines 187-207): list, get, create, update, delete, test
- `todos` (lines 211-226): list, get, acknowledge, resolve, reopen
- `system` (lines 230-235): health, stats, trend
- `discover` (lines 239-253): github, dockerhub
- `onboard` (lines 257-281): scan, getScan, apply

**Base Function**: `request<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T>` (lines 31-42)

**Constants**: `BASE` uses `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` or defaults to `/api/v1`

**Imports**: TypeScript type imports from `./types`, `fetch` API (browser native)

---

### 8. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/app/layout.tsx`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-45

**Key Elements**:
- Font imports: `Fraunces` (lines 6-11), `DM_Sans` (lines 13-17)
- **Export**: `metadata: Metadata` (lines 19-25) — Sets title, description, favicon
- **Component**: `RootLayout` (lines 27-44) — Server component wrapping layout with `Sidebar`, main flex layout

**Imports**: `next/font/google`, `@/components/layout/sidebar`, CSS

---

### 9. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/web/app/page.tsx`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-156

**Component**: `DashboardPage` (lines 17-155) — Client component
- Uses `useSWR` for projects data
- Implements SSE EventSource connection to `/api/v1/events` (lines 25-54)
- Renders conditional layout:
  - Quick Onboard section (lines 73-129) with repo URL input and scan button
  - If projects exist: `StatsCards`, `ReleaseTrendChart`, `UnifiedFeed` (lines 131-138)
  - Loading state or empty state

**Key Features**:
- SSE auto-reconnect with 5s retry (line 42)
- SWR cache revalidation on events (lines 34-38)
- Styled components using inline styles and Tailwind

**Imports**: `react` hooks, `swr`, `next/navigation`, dashboard components, `lucide-react`

---

### 10. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/internal/api/frontend.go`

**Full Content**: Lines 1-72

**Variable**: `dynamicRoutes` (lines 13-23)
- Maps URL patterns (with `*` wildcards) to Next.js static export HTML files
- Routes: `/projects/*/semantic-releases/*`, `/projects/*/agent`, `/projects/*`, `/releases/*`

**Functions**:
- `matchDynamicRoute(urlPath string) string` (lines 27-45) — Matches URL path to dynamic route pattern
- `RegisterFrontend(mux *http.ServeMux, webDir string)` (lines 50-71) — Serves Next.js static export with:
  - Exact file matching
  - `.html` appending convention
  - Dynamic route template matching
  - Index.html fallback

**Imports**: `net/http`, `os`, `path/filepath`, `strings`

---

### 11. `/Users/pc/web3/ReleaseBeacon/go.mod` (First 10 lines)

```
module github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue

go 1.25.0

require (
	github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0
	github.com/jackc/pgx/v5 v5.8.0
	github.com/riverqueue/river v0.31.0
	github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5 v0.31.0
	golang.org/x/time v0.14.0
```

**Module Name**: `github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue`

---

## Architecture Overview from These Files

**Backend (Go)**:
- API layer with middleware chain (auth, rate-limit, logging, CORS, panic recovery)
- Dependency injection via `Dependencies` struct passed to `RegisterRoutes`
- Database: PostgreSQL with River job queue
- Two worker types: `NotifyWorker` and `AgentWorker`

**Frontend (Next.js/React)**:
- Client-side SWR data fetching from API
- SSE for real-time updates
- Static export with dynamic route templates
- Custom fonts (Fraunces, DM Sans)

**Auth**: Bearer token validation via `KeyStore` interface; optional (NO_AUTH flag)

**Database Stores** (interface-based, likely implemented by `PgStore`):
- Projects, Sources, Releases, SemanticReleases, Subscriptions, Channels, ContextSources, Agents, Todos, Onboard, Keys, Health

- Routes: `/projects/*/semantic-releases/*`, `/projects/*/agent`, `/projects/*`, `/releases/*`

**Functions**:
- `matchDynamicRoute(urlPath string) string` (lines 27-45) — Matches URL path to dynamic route pattern
- `RegisterFrontend(mux *http.ServeMux, webDir string)` (lines 50-71) — Serves Next.js static export with:
  - Exact file matching
  - `.html` appending convention
  - Dynamic route template matching
  - Index.html fallback

**Imports**: `net/http`, `os`, `path/filepath`, `strings`

## Architecture Overview from These Files

**Backend (Go)**:
- API layer with middleware chain (auth, rate-limit, logging, CORS, panic recovery)
- Dependency injection via `Dependencies` struct passed to `RegisterRoutes`
- Database: PostgreSQL with River job queue
- Two worker types: `NotifyWorker` and `AgentWorker`

**Frontend (Next.js/React)**:
- Client-side SWR data fetching from API
- SSE for real-time updates
- Static export with dynamic route templates
- Custom fonts (Fraunces, DM Sans)

**Auth**: Bearer token validation via `KeyStore` interface; optional (NO_AUTH flag)

**Database Stores** (interface-based, likely implemented by `PgStore`):
- Projects, Sources, Releases, SemanticReleases, Subscriptions, Channels, ContextSources, Agents, Todos, Onboard, Keys, Health

content.content:
1→.PHONY: up down db-reset build run dev test vet lint \
     2→        frontend-install frontend-dev frontend-build \
     3→        integration-test agent-dev clean
     4→
     5→# --- Configuration ---
     6→DATABASE_URL ?= postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable
     7→LISTEN_ADDR  ?= :8080
     8→BINARY       := changelogue
     9→
    10→# --- Infrastructure ---
    11→up:
    12→	docker compose up -d
    13→	@echo "Waiting for Postgres to be healthy..."
    14→	@until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
    15→	@echo "Postgres is ready."
    16→
    17→down:
    18→	docker compose down
    19→
    20→db-reset:
    21→	docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS changelogue;"
    22→	docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE changelogue;"
    23→	@echo "Database reset."
    24→
    25→# --- Backend ---
    26→build:
    27→	go build -o $(BINARY) ./cmd/server
    28→
    29→run: build
    30→	DATABASE_URL="$(DATABASE_URL)" LISTEN_ADDR="$(LISTEN_ADDR)" NO_AUTH=true ./$(BINARY)
    31→
    32→test:
    33→	go test ./...
    34→
    35→vet:
    36→	go vet ./...
    37→
    38→lint: vet
    39→
    40→# --- Agent Dev ---
    41→agent-dev:
    42→	@if [ -z "$(PROJECT_ID)" ]; then echo "error: PROJECT_ID is required. Usage: make agent-dev PROJECT_ID=<uuid>"; exit 1; fi
    43→	DATABASE_URL="$(DATABASE_URL)" go run ./cmd/agent --project-id=$(PROJECT_ID) web api webui
    44→
    45→# --- Frontend ---
    46→frontend-install:
    47→	cd web && npm install
    48→
    49→frontend-dev:
    50→	cd web && npm run dev
    51→
    52→frontend-build:
    53→	cd web && npm run build
    54→
    55→# --- Integration ---
    56→integration-test:
    57→	bash scripts/integration-test.sh
    58→
    59→# --- Convenience ---
    60→dev: up run
    61→
    62→clean:
    63→	rm -f $(BINARY)
    64→	docker compose down -v
    65→

1→package db
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→
     7→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     8→)
     9→
    10→// NewPool creates a PostgreSQL connection pool and verifies connectivity.
    11→func NewPool(ctx context.Context, databaseURL string) (*pgxpool.Pool, error) {
    12→	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, databaseURL)
    13→	if err != nil {
    14→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("create pool: %w", err)
    15→	}
    16→	if err := pool.Ping(ctx); err != nil {
    17→		pool.Close()
    18→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("ping: %w", err)
    19→	}
    20→	return pool, nil
    21→}
    22→

content.content:
1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"net/http"
     5→
     6→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     7→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
     8→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
     9→)
    10→
    11→// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
    12→type Dependencies struct {
    13→	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
    14→	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
    15→	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
    16→	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
    17→	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
    18→	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
    19→	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
    20→	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
    21→	AgentStore            AgentStore
    22→	TodosStore            TodosStore
    23→	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
    24→	PublicURL             string
    25→	KeyStore              KeyStore
    26→	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
    27→	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
    28→	NoAuth                bool
    29→	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
    30→	HTTPClient            *http.Client
    31→}
    32→
    33→// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
    34→func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
    35→	// Public chain: no auth required.
    36→	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)
    37→
    38→	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    39→	chain := publicChain
    40→	if !deps.NoAuth {
    41→		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
    42→	}
    43→
    44→	// Projects (CRUD)
    45→	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
    46→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
    47→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
    48→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
    49→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
    50→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))
    51→
    52→	// Sources (nested under projects)
    53→	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
    54→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
    55→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
    56→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    57→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
    58→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
    59→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))
    60→
    61→	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
    62→	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
    63→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
    64→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
    65→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    66→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    67→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    68→
    69→	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
    70→	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
    71→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    72→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
    73→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))

    84→	// Subscriptions (CRUD)

    92→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))
    93→
    94→	// Channels (CRUD + test)

    98→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
    99→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
   100→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))

   102→
   103→	// Agent
   104→	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)

   108→

1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"crypto/sha256"
     6→	"encoding/hex"
     7→	"encoding/json"
     8→	"errors"
     9→	"fmt"
    10→	"strings"
    11→	"time"
    12→
    13→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
    14→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    15→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    16→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
    17→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18→)
    19→
    20→// PgStore implements all store interfaces using a PostgreSQL connection pool.
    21→type PgStore struct {
    22→	pool  *pgxpool.Pool
    23→	river *river.Client[pgx.Tx]
    24→}
    25→
    26→// NewPgStore returns a new PgStore backed by the given connection pool and River client.
    27→// The river client may be nil if agent triggering is not needed.
    28→func NewPgStore(pool *pgxpool.Pool, riverClient *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) *PgStore {
    29→	return &PgStore{pool: pool, river: riverClient}
    30→}
    31→
    32→// SetRiverClient updates the River client on an existing PgStore.
    33→// This is used during bootstrap to inject the client after worker registration.
    34→func (s *PgStore) SetRiverClient(rc *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) {
    35→	s.river = rc
    36→}
    37→
    38→// --- ProjectsStore ---
    39→
    40→func (s *PgStore) ListProjects(ctx context.Context, page, perPage int) ([]models.Project, int, error) {
    41→	var total int
    42→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects`).Scan(&total)
    43→	if err != nil {
    44→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("count projects: %w", err)
    45→	}
    46→	offset := (page - 1) * perPage
    47→	rows, err := s.pool.Query(ctx,
    48→		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    49→		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    50→		 FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2`, perPage, offset)
    51→	if err != nil {
    52→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("list projects: %w", err)
    53→	}
    54→	defer rows.Close()
    55→	var projects []models.Project
    56→	for rows.Next() {
    57→		var p models.Project
    58→		if err := rows.Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt); err != nil {
    59→			return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("scan project: %w", err)
    60→		}
    61→		projects = append(projects, p)
    62→	}
    63→	return projects, total, nil
    64→}
    65→
    66→func (s *PgStore) CreateProject(ctx context.Context, p *models.Project) error {
    67→	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    68→		`INSERT INTO projects (name, description, agent_prompt, agent_rules)
    69→		 VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
    70→		 RETURNING id, created_at, updated_at`,
    71→		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules,
    72→	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    73→}
    74→
    75→func (s *PgStore) GetProject(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Project, error) {
    76→	var p models.Project
    77→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    78→		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    79→		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    80→		 FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id,
    81→	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    82→	if err != nil {
    83→		return nil, err
    84→	}
    85→	return &p, nil
    86→}
    87→
    88→func (s *PgStore) UpdateProject(ctx context.Context, id string, p *models.Project) error {
    89→	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    90→		`UPDATE projects SET name=$1, description=$2, agent_prompt=$3, agent_rules=$4, updated_at=NOW()
    91→		 WHERE id=$5 RETURNING updated_at`,
    92→		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules, id,
    93→	).Scan(&p.UpdatedAt)
    94→}
    95→
    96→func (s *PgStore) DeleteProject(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    97→	tag, err := s.pool.Exec(ctx, `DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id)
    98→	if err != nil {
    99→		return err
   100→	}

1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"net/http"
     6→
     7→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
     8→)
     9→
    10→// TodosStore defines the data access interface for TODO operations.
    11→type TodosStore interface {
    12→	ListTodos(ctx context.Context, status string, page, perPage int, aggregated bool) ([]models.Todo, int, error)
    13→	GetTodo(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Todo, error)
    14→	AcknowledgeTodo(ctx context.Context, id string, cascade bool) error
    15→	ResolveTodo(ctx context.Context, id string, cascade bool) error
    16→	ReopenTodo(ctx context.Context, id string) error
    17→}
    18→
    19→// TodosHandler handles HTTP requests for release TODOs.
    20→type TodosHandler struct {
    21→	store     TodosStore
    22→	publicURL string
    23→}
    24→
    25→// NewTodosHandler creates a new TodosHandler.
    26→func NewTodosHandler(store TodosStore, publicURL string) *TodosHandler {
    27→	return &TodosHandler{store: store, publicURL: publicURL}
    28→}
    29→
    30→// List returns a paginated list of TODOs, optionally filtered by status.
    31→func (h *TodosHandler) List(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    32→	page, perPage := ParsePagination(r)
    33→	status := r.URL.Query().Get("status")
    34→	aggregated := r.URL.Query().Get("aggregated") == "true"
    35→
    36→	todos, total, err := h.store.ListTodos(r.Context(), status, page, perPage, aggregated)
    37→	if err != nil {
    38→		RespondError(w, r, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", err.Error())
    39→		return
    40→	}
    41→	if todos == nil {
    42→		todos = []models.Todo{}
    43→	}
    44→	RespondList(w, r, http.StatusOK, todos, page, perPage, total)
    45→}
    46→
    47→// Get returns a single TODO by ID.
    48→func (h *TodosHandler) Get(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    49→	id := r.PathValue("id")
    50→	todo, err := h.store.GetTodo(r.Context(), id)

1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"encoding/json"

     7→	"fmt"
     8→	"net/http"
     9→	"strings"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
    12→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
    13→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/onboard"
    14→)
    15→
    16→// OnboardSelection represents a user's choice for one dependency.
    17→type OnboardSelection struct {
    18→	DepName        string `json:"dep_name"`
    19→	UpstreamRepo   string `json:"upstream_repo"`
    20→	Provider       string `json:"provider"`
    21→	ProjectID      string `json:"project_id,omitempty"`
    22→	NewProjectName string `json:"new_project_name,omitempty"`
    23→}
    24→
    25→// OnboardApplyResult holds the outcome of applying scan selections.
    26→type OnboardApplyResult struct {
    27→	CreatedProjects []models.Project `json:"created_projects"`
    28→	CreatedSources  []models.Source  `json:"created_sources"`
    29→	Skipped         []string         `json:"skipped"`
    30→}
    31→
    32→// OnboardStore defines the data access interface for onboarding operations.
    33→type OnboardStore interface {
    34→	CreateOnboardScan(ctx context.Context, repoURL string) (*models.OnboardScan, error)
    35→	GetOnboardScan(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.OnboardScan, error)
    36→	UpdateOnboardScanStatus(ctx context.Context, id, status string, results json.RawMessage, scanErr string) error
    37→	ActiveScanForRepo(ctx context.Context, repoURL string) (*models.OnboardScan, error)
    38→	ApplyOnboardScan(ctx context.Context, scanID string, selections []OnboardSelection) (*OnboardApplyResult, error)
    39→}
    40→
    41→// OnboardHandler handles HTTP requests for repo onboarding.
    42→type OnboardHandler struct {
    43→	store OnboardStore
    44→}
    45→
    46→// NewOnboardHandler creates a new OnboardHandler.
    47→func NewOnboardHandler(store OnboardStore) *OnboardHandler {
    48→	return &OnboardHandler{store: store}
    49→}
    50→
    51→// Scan creates a new dependency scan for a GitHub repo.
    52→func (h *OnboardHandler) Scan(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    53→	var input struct {
    54→		RepoURL string `json:"repo_url"`
    55→	}
    56→	if err := DecodeJSON(r, &input); err != nil {
    57→		RespondError(w, r, http.StatusBadRequest, "bad_request", err.Error())
    58→		return
    59→	}

1→package db
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→
     7→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     8→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5"
     9→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/rivermigrate"
    10→)
    11→
    12→const schema = `
    13→-- Tracked software projects (the central entity)
    14→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    15→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    16→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    17→    description TEXT,
    18→    agent_prompt TEXT,
    19→    agent_rules JSONB,
    20→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    21→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    22→);
    23→
    24→-- Configured ingestion sources (polling-based: GitHub, Docker Hub)
    25→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sources (
    26→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    27→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28→    provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    29→    repository VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30→    poll_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 86400,
    31→    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    32→    config JSONB,
    33→    last_polled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    34→    last_error TEXT,
    35→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    36→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    37→    UNIQUE(provider, repository)
    38→);
    39→
    40→-- Context sources (read-only references for agent research)
    41→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS context_sources (
    42→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    43→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    45→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    46→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    47→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    48→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    49→);
    50→
    51→-- Source-level releases (detected from polling sources)
    52→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS releases (
    53→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    54→    source_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    55→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    56→    raw_data JSONB,
    57→    released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    58→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    59→    UNIQUE(source_id, version)
    60→);
    61→
    62→-- Project-level semantic releases (AI-generated, correlating source releases)
    63→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_releases (
    64→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    65→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    66→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    67→    report JSONB,
    68→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    69→    error TEXT,
    70→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    71→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    72→    UNIQUE(project_id, version)
    73→);
    74→
    75→-- Join table: which source releases compose a semantic release
    76→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_release_sources (
    77→    semantic_release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    78→    release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    79→    PRIMARY KEY (semantic_release_id, release_id)
    80→);
    81→
    82→-- Notification channels (standalone)
    83→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_channels (
    84→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    85→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    86→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    87→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    88→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    89→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    90→);
    91→
    92→-- Subscriptions: two types (source releases and semantic releases)
    93→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (
    94→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    95→    channel_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES notification_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release')),
    97→    source_id UUID REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98→    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    99→    version_filter TEXT,
   100→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   101→    CHECK (
   102→        (type = 'source_release'   AND source_id  IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   103→        (type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id  IS NULL)
   104→    )
   105→);
   106→
   107→-- Agent runs (scoped to project)
   108→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_runs (
   109→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   110→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   111→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   112→    trigger VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   113→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   114→    prompt_used TEXT,
   115→    error TEXT,
   116→    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   117→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   118→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
   119→);
   120→
   121→ALTER TABLE agent_runs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version VARCHAR(100);
   122→
   123→-- API authentication keys
   124→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
   125→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   126→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   127→    key_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   128→    key_prefix VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL,
   129→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   130→    last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   131→);
   132→
   133→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on new releases
   134→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_release_created() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   135→BEGIN
   136→    PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   137→    RETURN NEW;
   138→END;
   139→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   140→
   141→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS release_created_trigger ON releases;
   142→CREATE TRIGGER release_created_trigger
   143→    AFTER INSERT ON releases
   144→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_release_created();
   145→
   146→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on semantic release completion
   147→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   148→BEGIN
   149→    IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND (OLD IS NULL OR OLD.status != 'completed') THEN
   150→        PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'semantic_release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   151→    END IF;
   152→    RETURN NEW;
   153→END;
   154→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   155→
   156→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS semantic_release_trigger ON semantic_releases;
   157→CREATE TRIGGER semantic_release_trigger
   158→    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON semantic_releases
   159→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release();
   160→
   161→-- Release TODOs (acknowledge/resolve tracking)
   162→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS release_todos (
   163→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   164→    release_id UUID REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   165→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   166→    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   167→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   168→    acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   169→    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   170→    CHECK (
   171→        (release_id IS NOT NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NULL) OR
   172→        (release_id IS NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL)
   173→    )
   174→);
   175→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_release_id ON release_todos(release_id) WHERE release_id IS NOT NULL;
   176→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_semantic_release_id ON release_todos(semantic_release_id) WHERE semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL;
   177→
   178→-- Onboarding scans (GitHub repo dependency detection)
   179→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboard_scans (
   180→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   181→    repo_url TEXT NOT NULL,
   182→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   183→    results JSONB,
   184→    error TEXT,
   185→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   186→    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   187→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   188→);
   189→`
   190→
   191→// RunMigrations applies River's schema and the application schema. Idempotent — safe to call on every startup.
   192→func RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
   193→	migrator, err := rivermigrate.New(riverpgxv5.New(pool), nil)
   194→	if err != nil {
   195→		return fmt.Errorf("create river migrator: %w", err)
   196→	}
   197→	if _, err := migrator.Migrate(ctx, rivermigrate.DirectionUp, nil); err != nil {
   198→		return fmt.Errorf("river migrations: %w", err)
   199→	}
   200→
   201→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, schema); err != nil {
   202→		return fmt.Errorf("app migrations: %w", err)
   203→	}
   204→
   205→	// Migrate existing subscription type values: source→source_release, project→semantic_release.
   206→	// Drop old CHECK constraints first (both the named type check and the unnamed
   207→	// composite check referencing old values), then UPDATE data, then re-add constraints.
   208→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   209→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_type_check;
   210→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_check;
   211→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'source_release' WHERE type = 'source';
   212→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'semantic_release' WHERE type = 'project';
   213→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_type_check CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release'));
   214→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_check CHECK (
   215→			(type = 'source_release'   AND source_id IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   216→			(type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL)
   217→		);
   218→	`); err != nil {
   219→		return fmt.Errorf("subscription type migration: %w", err)
   220→	}
   221→
   222→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   223→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_include TEXT;
   224→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_exclude TEXT;
   225→	`); err != nil {
   226→		return fmt.Errorf("source version filter migration: %w", err)
   227→	}
   228→
   229→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   230→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS exclude_prereleases BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
   231→	`); err != nil {
   232→		return fmt.Errorf("source exclude_prereleases migration: %w", err)
   233→	}
   234→	return nil
   235→}
   236→

1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"log/slog"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/signal"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12→	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/onboard"
    17→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    18→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    19→)
    20→
    21→func main() {
    22→	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    23→	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    24→	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    25→	case "debug":
    26→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    27→	case "warn":
    28→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    29→	case "error":
    30→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    31→	}
    32→	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    33→
    34→	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    35→	defer stop()
    36→
    37→	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    38→	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    39→	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    40→
    41→	// Database
    42→	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    43→	if err != nil {
    44→		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    45→		os.Exit(1)
    46→	}
    47→	defer pool.Close()
    48→
    49→	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    50→		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    51→		os.Exit(1)
    52→	}
    53→
    54→	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    55→	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    56→	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    57→	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    58→
    59→	// Register River workers
    60→	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    61→	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    62→	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    63→
    64→	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    65→	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    66→	// is restarted.
    67→	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    68→	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    69→	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    70→		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    71→	}
    72→	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    73→		Provider:      llmProvider,
    74→		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    75→		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    76→		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    77→		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    78→	}
    79→	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    80→	if err != nil {
    81→		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available — agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    82→	} else {
    83→		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    84→		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    85→		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    86→	}
    87→
    88→	// Scan worker: requires LLM for dependency extraction
    89→	scanScanner := onboard.NewScanner(http.DefaultClient, "", "")
    90→	var scanExtractor *onboard.DependencyExtractor
    91→	extractorCfg := onboard.ExtractorConfig{
    92→		Provider:      llmConfig.Provider,
    93→		Model:         llmConfig.Model,
    94→		GoogleAPIKey:  llmConfig.GoogleAPIKey,
    95→		OpenAIAPIKey:  llmConfig.OpenAIAPIKey,
    96→		OpenAIBaseURL: llmConfig.OpenAIBaseURL,
    97→	}
    98→	ext, err := onboard.NewDependencyExtractor(ctx, extractorCfg)
    99→	if err != nil {
   100→		slog.Warn("dependency extractor not available", "err", err)
   101→	} else {
   102→		scanExtractor = ext
   103→	}
   104→	scanWorker := onboard.NewScanWorker(pgStore, scanScanner, scanExtractor, pool)
   105→	river.AddWorker(workers, scanWorker)
   106→	slog.Info("scan worker registered")
   107→
   108→	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
   109→	if err != nil {
   110→		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
   111→		os.Exit(1)
   112→	}
   113→
   114→	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
   115→	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
   116→	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
   117→
   118→	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
   119→		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
   120→		os.Exit(1)
   121→	}
   122→
   123→	// Ingestion layer
   124→	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   125→	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   126→
   127→	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   128→	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   129→
   130→	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   131→
   132→	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   133→
   134→	// Serve frontend static export if available
   135→	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   136→		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   137→		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   138→	}
   139→
   140→	// Register all API v1 routes
   141→	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   142→		DB:                    pool,
   143→		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   144→		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   145→		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   146→		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   147→		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   148→		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   149→		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   150→		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   151→		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   152→		OnboardStore:          pgStore,
   153→		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   154→		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   155→		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   156→		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   157→		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   158→		IngestionService:      svc,
   159→		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   160→	})
   161→
   162→	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   163→
   164→	// Start polling in background
   165→	go orch.Run(ctx)
   166→
   167→	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY → SSE bridge
   168→	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   169→
   170→	// Start HTTP server
   171→	go func() {
   172→		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   173→		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   174→			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   175→		}
   176→	}()
   177→
   178→	<-ctx.Done()
   179→	slog.Info("shutting down")
   180→
   181→	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   182→	defer cancel()
   183→	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   184→	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   185→}
   186→
   187→func envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   188→	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   189→		return v
   190→	}
   191→	return fallback
   192→}
   193→

1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"net/http"
     5→
     6→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     7→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
     8→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
     9→)
    10→
    11→// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
    12→type Dependencies struct {
    13→	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
    14→	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
    15→	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
    16→	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
    17→	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
    18→	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
    19→	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
    20→	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
    21→	AgentStore            AgentStore
    22→	TodosStore            TodosStore
    23→	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
    24→	PublicURL             string
    25→	KeyStore              KeyStore
    26→	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
    27→	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
    28→	NoAuth                bool
    29→	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
    30→	HTTPClient            *http.Client
    31→}
    32→
    33→// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
    34→func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
    35→	// Public chain: no auth required.
    36→	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)
    37→
    38→	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    39→	chain := publicChain
    40→	if !deps.NoAuth {
    41→		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
    42→	}
    43→
    44→	// Projects (CRUD)
    45→	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
    46→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
    47→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
    48→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
    49→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
    50→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))
    51→
    52→	// Sources (nested under projects)
    53→	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
    54→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
    55→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
    56→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    57→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
    58→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
    59→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))
    60→
    61→	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
    62→	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
    63→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
    64→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
    65→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    66→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    67→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    68→
    69→	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
    70→	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
    71→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    72→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
    73→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
    74→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))
    75→
    76→	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
    77→	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
    78→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
    79→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
    80→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
    81→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
    82→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))
    83→
    84→	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
    85→	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
    86→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
    87→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
    88→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))

package api

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
)

// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
type Dependencies struct {
	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
	AgentStore            AgentStore
	TodosStore            TodosStore
	OnboardStore          OnboardStore
	PublicURL             string
	KeyStore              KeyStore
	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
	NoAuth                bool
	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
	HTTPClient            *http.Client
}

// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
	// Public chain: no auth required.
	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)

	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
	chain := publicChain
	if !deps.NoAuth {
		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
	}

	// Projects (CRUD)
	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))

	// Sources (nested under projects)
	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))

	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))

	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))

	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))

	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))

	// Channels (CRUD + test)
	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))

	// Agent
	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))

	// Todos
	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))

	// Onboard (repo dependency scanning)
	ob := NewOnboardHandler(deps.OnboardStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scan", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Scan)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.GetScan)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/onboard/scans/{id}/apply", chain(http.HandlerFunc(ob.Apply)))

	// Providers (metadata — static, no store needed)
	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))

	// Discovery (public — no auth, proxies external APIs)
	discover := NewDiscoverHandler(deps.HTTPClient, "", "")
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/github", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.GitHub)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/dockerhub", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.DockerHub)))

	// SSE events
	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))

	// Health (public — no auth middleware)
	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats/trend", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Trend)))
}
